top_findings.title: Package does not build — main package has no func main
top_findings.evidence: go build ./... => 'runtime.main_main·f: function main is undeclared in the main package'; workspace contains only models.go (types) — no main.go, handlers.go, database.go
top_findings.suggestion: Deliver the full service (main, router, handlers, persistence); the agent stopped after writing models.go (see _agent_stdout.log: write_file guard, planned heredoc fallback never landed)

top_findings.title: POST /books create endpoint missing
top_findings.evidence: No HTTP handler or route in workspace; only DTO type CreateBookRequest exists in models.go:22
top_findings.suggestion: Implement a POST /books handler that validates and persists a book

top_findings.title: GET /books list endpoint missing
top_findings.evidence: No router/handler code exists; models.go declares types only
top_findings.suggestion: Implement GET /books returning the collection as JSON

top_findings.title: GET /books ?author= filter missing
top_findings.evidence: No list handler exists, so no query-param filtering
top_findings.suggestion: Add ?author= filtering to the list handler

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} get-by-id endpoint missing
top_findings.suggestion: Implement GET /books/{id} returning one book or 404
